center.name: Florent Prévost
center.summary: Florent Prévost是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括D'Arnaud's barbet，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: D'Arnaud's barbet (Trachyphonus darnaudii) is a species of bird in the family Lybiidae that is found in East Africa
